# space4time

The goal of space4time is to provide a user-friendly interface for
fitting a age-specific time-stratified space-for-time mark-recapture
model.

## Installation

You can install the development version of space4time like so:

``` r
remotes::install_github("ryanvosbigian/space4time")
```

## Example

``` r
library(space4time)
## basic example code

set.seed(1)

# simulate data required to make capture history
sim.dat <- sim_simple_s4t_ch(N = 800)

# to make the capture history, need data in a specific format.

# the observations of individuals need to be in a data.frame, with
# the columns "id", "site", "time", and "removed" (no other columns are used)
head(sim.dat$s4t_ch$obs_data$ch_df)
#>   id site time removed
#> 1  1    1    2   FALSE
#> 2  1    2    3   FALSE
#> 3  2    1    1   FALSE
#> 4  2    2    1   FALSE
#> 5  3    1    1   FALSE
#> 6  3    2    2   FALSE

# id is the individual ID. Converted to a character type.
# site is the name of the site the individual was observed at
# time is the time stratum (i.e. year). Can be a Date format or integer.
# removed is a logical (TRUE or FALSE) that indicates where the individual
#         was removed at that site (i.e. capture but not released)

# the data on the age of the individuals 
head(sim.dat$s4t_ch$obs_data$all_aux)
#>   obs_time   FL ageclass
#> 1        2 -2.8       NA
#> 2        1 -1.5        2
#> 3        1  0.9       NA
#> 4        1  4.9        3
#> 5        2 -3.6        1
#> 6        1  4.8        3
# the required columns are "id", "obs_time", and "ageclass"
# id is the individual id. Note that all individuals must be included
# obs_time is the time when the age of the individuals was observed. Or,
#           if the time when the individual was first observed.
# ageclass is the age of the individual. If age is unknown, NA is used.
# Other columns can be used in the ageclass submodel or for 
#           individual based covariates. NAs are not allowed.

# Also need to make the s4t_config object, which describes the sites arrangement,
# and the ages that individuals can be.

# Fitting the model.
# p_formula = ~ t : detection probability varies by time (note that
#                   detection probabilities are not used for transitions from
#                   the first site or to the last site. 
#                   Because there are only 3 sites, the only site where
#                   detection probs are estimated are for site 2. 
#                   If there were additional sites, then we would use ~t*k)

# theta_formula = ~ a1 * a2 * s * j : fitting the fully saturated transition
#                                     probabilities. This allows for separate
#                                     probabilities for each age, duration of
#                                     holdover (i.e. age that individuals
#                                     transition to the next site), time, 
#                                     and site.

# fixed_age = TRUE : The age-class submodel is fit separately, and the outputs
#                     are used in the mark-recapture model. The model runs
#                     faster when this is done.

m1 <- fit_s4t_cjs_rstan(
      p_formula = ~ t,
      theta_formula = ~ a1 * a2 * s * j,
      ageclass_formula = ~ FL,
      fixed_age = TRUE,
      s4t_ch = sim.dat$s4t_ch,
      chains = 2,
      warmup = 200,
      iter = 600
    )
#> 
#> SAMPLING FOR MODEL 's4t_cjs_fixedage_draft7' NOW (CHAIN 1).
#> Chain 1: 
#> Chain 1: Gradient evaluation took 0.0013 seconds
#> Chain 1: 1000 transitions using 10 leapfrog steps per transition would take 13 seconds.
#> Chain 1: Adjust your expectations accordingly!
#> Chain 1: 
#> Chain 1: 
#> Chain 1: Iteration:   1 / 600 [  0%]  (Warmup)
#> Chain 1: Iteration:  60 / 600 [ 10%]  (Warmup)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 120 / 600 [ 20%]  (Warmup)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 180 / 600 [ 30%]  (Warmup)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 201 / 600 [ 33%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 260 / 600 [ 43%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 320 / 600 [ 53%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 380 / 600 [ 63%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 440 / 600 [ 73%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 500 / 600 [ 83%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 560 / 600 [ 93%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 1: Iteration: 600 / 600 [100%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 1: 
#> Chain 1:  Elapsed Time: 19.786 seconds (Warm-up)
#> Chain 1:                36.958 seconds (Sampling)
#> Chain 1:                56.744 seconds (Total)
#> Chain 1: 
#> 
#> SAMPLING FOR MODEL 's4t_cjs_fixedage_draft7' NOW (CHAIN 2).
#> Chain 2: 
#> Chain 2: Gradient evaluation took 0.001512 seconds
#> Chain 2: 1000 transitions using 10 leapfrog steps per transition would take 15.12 seconds.
#> Chain 2: Adjust your expectations accordingly!
#> Chain 2: 
#> Chain 2: 
#> Chain 2: Iteration:   1 / 600 [  0%]  (Warmup)
#> Chain 2: Iteration:  60 / 600 [ 10%]  (Warmup)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 120 / 600 [ 20%]  (Warmup)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 180 / 600 [ 30%]  (Warmup)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 201 / 600 [ 33%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 260 / 600 [ 43%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 320 / 600 [ 53%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 380 / 600 [ 63%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 440 / 600 [ 73%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 500 / 600 [ 83%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 560 / 600 [ 93%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 2: Iteration: 600 / 600 [100%]  (Sampling)
#> Chain 2: 
#> Chain 2:  Elapsed Time: 22.833 seconds (Warm-up)
#> Chain 2:                36.527 seconds (Sampling)
#> Chain 2:                59.36 seconds (Total)
#> Chain 2:


# plot the transition probabilities:
plotTransitions(m1)
```

![](reference/figures/README-example-1.png)

``` r

# plot the apparent survival probabilities:
plotSurvival(m1)
```

![](reference/figures/README-example-2.png)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`abundance_estimates()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/abundance_estimates.md)
  : Calculate abundance estimates

- [`add_covariates()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/add_covariates.md)
  : Add covariates to a space4time capture history object

- [`AIC(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/AIC.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  : Compute and return AIC of fitted model objects

- [`AIC(`*`<s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/AIC.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  : Compute AIC of fitted model objects

- [`anova(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/anova.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  : Compute likelihood ratio tests of two fitted model objects

- [`anova(`*`<s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/anova.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  : Compute likelihood ratio tests of two fitted model objects

- [`clean_s4t_ch_obs()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/clean_s4t_ch_obs.md)
  : Clean the capture history of a space4time capture history object

- [`coef(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/coef.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  [`coefficients(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/coef.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  : Extract fitted model coefficients

- [`coef(`*`<s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/coef.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  [`coefficients(`*`<s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/coef.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  : Extract fitted model coefficients

- [`confint(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/confint.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  : Confidence intervals for fitted model parameters for
  s4t_ageclass_model

- [`confint(`*`<s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/confint.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  : Confidence intervals for fitted model parameters for s4t_cjs_ml

- [`extract_ageclass_fit()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/extract_ageclass_fit.md)
  :

  Extract `s4t_ageclass_model` object from a `s4t_cjs_rstan` or
  `s4t_cjs_ml` object

- [`extract_covariates()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/extract_covariates.md)
  : Extract indices and covariates from space4time capture history
  objects

- [`fit_ageclass()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/fit_ageclass.md)
  : Fit age-class model using ordinal regression

- [`fit_s4t_cjs_ml()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/fit_s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  : Fit space-for-time mark-recapture model in likelihood framework

- [`fit_s4t_cjs_rstan()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/fit_s4t_cjs_rstan.md)
  : Fit space-for-time mark-recapture model in Bayesian framework

- [`linear_s4t_config()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/linear_s4t_config.md)
  : Create site configuration for simple linear arrangement

- [`loo(`*`<s4t_cjs_rstan>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/loo.s4t_cjs_rstan.md)
  : Efficient approximate leave-one-out cross-validation (LOO)

- [`plot(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/plot.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  : Plot confusion matrix for fit_ageclass objects

- [`plotCH()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/plotCH.md)
  : Plot summary of s4t_cjs_ch object

- [`plotCov()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/plotCov.md)
  : Effect plot for s4t_cjs_rstan object

- [`plotSurvival()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/plotSurvival.md)
  :

  Plot apparent survival estimates from fitted `s4t_cjs_ml` or
  `s4t_cjs_rstan`objects

- [`plotTransitions()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/plotTransitions.md)
  :

  Plot transition probability estimates from fitted `s4t_cjs_ml` or
  `s4t_cjs_rstan`objects

- [`predict(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/predict.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  :

  Model predictions from fitted `fit_ageclass` objects

- [`print(`*`<clean_s4t_ch>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/print.clean_s4t_ch.md)
  :

  Print summary of `clean_s4t_ch` object

- [`print(`*`<cov_s4t_ch>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/print.cov_s4t_ch.md)
  :

  Print summary of `cov_s4t_ch` object

- [`print(`*`<s4t_ch>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/print.s4t_ch.md)
  :

  Print summary of `s4t_ch` object

- [`print(`*`<s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/print.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  :

  Print `s4t_cjs_ml`

- [`print(`*`<s4t_cjs_rstan>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/print.s4t_cjs_rstan.md)
  :

  Print summary of `s4t_cjs_rstan`

- [`print(`*`<s4t_config>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/print.s4t_config.md)
  :

  Print summary of `s4t_config` object

- [`print(`*`<summary.s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/print.summary.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  :

  Print summary of `s4t_cjs_ml`

- [`read_DART_file()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/read_DART_file.md)
  : Read DART Basin TribPit observation files and combine with auxiliary
  age data

- [`remove_kelt_obs()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/remove_kelt_obs.md)
  : Remove observations of kelts

- [`s4t_ch()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/s4t_ch.md)
  : Create space-for-time mark-recapture capture history object

- [`s4t_config()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/s4t_config.md)
  :

  Create space4time site configuration object (`s4t_config`)

- [`simplebranch_s4t_config()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/simplebranch_s4t_config.md)
  : Create site configuration for simple branching site arrangement

- [`sim_simple_s4t_ch()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/sim_simple_s4t_ch.md)
  : Simulate simple capture history

- [`space4time`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/space4time.md)
  : space4time

- [`summary(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/summary.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  : Summarize a fitted model object

- [`summary(`*`<s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/summary.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  : Summarize a fitted model object

- [`summary(`*`<s4t_cjs_rstan>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/summary.s4t_cjs_rstan.md)
  :

  Summary method for `s4t_cjs_rstan` objects

- [`traceplot.s4t_cjs_rstan()`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/traceplot.s4t_cjs_rstan.md)
  : Markov chain traceplots

- [`vcov(`*`<s4t_ageclass_model>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/vcov.s4t_ageclass_model.md)
  : Calculate variance-covariance matrix for a fitted model object

- [`vcov(`*`<s4t_cjs_ml>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/vcov.s4t_cjs_ml.md)
  : Calculate variance-covariance matrix for a fitted model object

- [`waic(`*`<s4t_cjs_rstan>`*`)`](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/reference/waic.s4t_cjs_rstan.md)
  : Widely applicable information criterion (WAIC)

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [covariates](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/articles/covariates.md):
- [Example using PTAGIS
  queries](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/articles/Example.md):
- [Introduction to fitting age-specific space-for-time mark-recapture
  models](https://ryanvosbigian.github.io/space4time/articles/introduction.md):
